name: LV_524_01_STINVENS
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_524_01_STINVENS] AS
SELECT
LOGICALREF, STOCKREF, INVENNO, MONTH_,
SUM(SALES_AMOUNT) SALES_AMOUNT, SUM(SALES_CASHAMNT) SALES_CASHAMNT, SUM(SALES_CURRAMNT) SALES_CURRAMNT,
SUM(SALES_VATAMNT) SALES_VATAMNT, SUM(SALES_DISCAMNT) SALES_DISCAMNT, SUM(SALES_RETAMNT) SALES_RETAMNT,
SUM(PURCHASES_AMOUNT) PURCHASES_AMOUNT, SUM(PURCHASES_CASHAMNT) PURCHASES_CASHAMNT, SUM(PURCHASES_CURRAMNT) PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
SUM(PURCHASES_VATAMNT) PURCHASES_VATAMNT, SUM(PURCHASES_DISCAMNT) PURCHASES_DISCAMNT, SUM(PURCHASES_RETAMNT) PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
YEAR_, VARIANTREF, MTRLINC, VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
(
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF,  L.SOURCEINDEX AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN STFICHEREF>0 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) END ) SALES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) SALES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) SALES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) SALES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) SALES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) SALES_RETAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) YEAR_,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 0 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND L.TRCODE IN (2,3,7,8,9,35,36,37,38,39,14)
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (9) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(9)))
 AND ((L.STFICHEREF=0 AND L.TRCODE IN (14)) OR (L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.TRCODE NOT IN (14)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, L.SOURCEINDEX, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF,  L.SOURCEINDEX AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 0 SALES_AMOUNT,
 0 SALES_CASHAMNT,
 0 SALES_CURRAMNT,
 0 SALES_VATAMNT,
 0 SALES_DISCAMNT,
 0 SALES_RETAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN STFICHEREF>0 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) END ) PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) ,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 0 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND L.TRCODE IN (1,5,6,26,30,31,32,33,34,13)
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (5) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(5)))
 AND ((L.STFICHEREF=0 AND L.TRCODE IN (13)) OR (L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.TRCODE NOT IN (13)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, L.SOURCEINDEX , YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF, -1 AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN STFICHEREF>0 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) END ) SALES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) SALES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) SALES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) SALES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) SALES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) SALES_RETAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) YEAR_,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 0 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND L.TRCODE IN (2,3,7,8,9,35,36,37,38,39,14)
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (9) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(9)))
 AND ((L.STFICHEREF=0 AND L.TRCODE IN (14)) OR (L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.TRCODE NOT IN (14)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF, -1 AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 0 SALES_AMOUNT,
 0 SALES_CASHAMNT,
 0 SALES_CURRAMNT,
 0 SALES_VATAMNT,
 0 SALES_DISCAMNT,
 0 SALES_RETAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN (CASE WHEN TRCODE IN (13) THEN 0 ELSE (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) END)*-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN TRCODE IN (13)
 THEN 0 ELSE (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) END) END ) PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END)*-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END) ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END)*-1
                       ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END) ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) ,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 0 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND L.TRCODE IN (1,5,6,26,30,31,32,33,34,13)
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (5) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(5)))
 AND ((L.STFICHEREF=0 AND L.TRCODE IN (13)) OR (L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.TRCODE NOT IN (13)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF,  L.SOURCEINDEX AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN TRCODE<>14 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) END ) SALES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) SALES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) SALES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) SALES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) SALES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) SALES_RETAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) YEAR_,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 1 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (2, 3, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 51)) OR (((L.TRCODE = 25) AND (L.IOCODE = 3)) ) OR (L.TRCODE=14 AND L.STFICHEREF=0))
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (9) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(9)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, L.SOURCEINDEX, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF,  L.SOURCEINDEX AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 0 SALES_AMOUNT,
 0 SALES_CASHAMNT,
 0 SALES_CURRAMNT,
 0 SALES_VATAMNT,
 0 SALES_DISCAMNT,
 0 SALES_RETAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN STFICHEREF>0 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END)  END ) PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) ,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 1 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (1, 5, 6, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 26, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 50)) OR (((L.TRCODE = 25) AND (L.IOCODE = 2)) ))
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (5) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(5)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, L.SOURCEINDEX , YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF, -1 AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN TRCODE<>14 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END) END ) SALES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) SALES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) SALES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) SALES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) SALES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (2,3,4) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) SALES_RETAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 0 PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) YEAR_,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 1 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (2, 3, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 51)) OR (((L.TRCODE = 25) AND (L.IOCODE = 3)) ) OR (L.TRCODE=14 AND L.STFICHEREF=0))
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (9) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(9)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
UNION
SELECT
 0 AS LOGICALREF, L.STOCKREF, -1 AS INVENNO, MONTH(L.DATE_) MONTH_,
 0 SALES_AMOUNT,
 0 SALES_CASHAMNT,
 0 SALES_CURRAMNT,
 0 SALES_VATAMNT,
 0 SALES_DISCAMNT,
 0 SALES_RETAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END) / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) *-1 ELSE (CASE WHEN STFICHEREF>0 THEN (((CASE L.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO2 END)
 / (CASE L.UINFO1 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE L.UINFO1 END))*L.AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END)  END ) PURCHASES_AMOUNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.LINENET *-1 ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN L.LINENET ELSE L.LINENET*-1 END) END) PURCHASES_CASHAMNT,
 ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE)*-1 END) ELSE (CASE L.DECPRDIFF WHEN 0 THEN (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)
                       ELSE (CASE L.REPORTRATE WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (L.LINENET/L.REPORTRATE) END)*-1 END) END) ,2) PURCHASES_CURRAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.VATAMNT *-1 ELSE L.VATAMNT END) PURCHASES_VATAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.DISTDISC *-1 ELSE L.DISTDISC END) PURCHASES_DISCAMNT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN L.TRCODE IN (6,10) THEN L.LINENET ELSE 0 END) PURCHASES_RETAMNT,
 YEAR(L.DATE_) ,
 0 VARIANTREF,
 1 MTRLINC,
 ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0) VIRTUALINVEN
FROM
 LG_524_01_STLINE L
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK)  ON L.SOURCEINDEX=WHOUSE.NR AND WHOUSE.FIRMNR=524
WHERE
 L.CANCELLED=0
 AND L.STATUS = 0
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (1, 5, 6, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 26, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 50)) OR (((L.TRCODE = 25) AND (L.IOCODE = 2)) ))
 AND ((L.TRCODE IN (5) AND L.STFICHEREF>0 AND L.BILLED = 1) OR (L.TRCODE NOT IN(5)))
 AND L.LINETYPE IN (0, 1, 5, 6, 8, 9)
GROUP BY
 L.STOCKREF, YEAR(L.DATE_), MONTH(L.DATE_), ISNULL(WHOUSE.VIRTUALINVEN,0)
)TMP
GROUP BY
 LOGICALREF, STOCKREF, INVENNO, MONTH_, YEAR_, VARIANTREF, MTRLINC, VIRTUALINVEN
